username.description: SendOwl API key, sent as the HTTP Basic username.

password.description: SendOwl API secret, sent as the HTTP Basic password. Never logged.

base_url.description: SendOwl API host, with no /api/v1 (or /api/v1_2, /api/v1_3) suffix -- each stream/write's own path now carries its own API version segment, since SendOwl's real documented surface spans v1 (products/subscriptions/packages/licenses), v1_2 (discounts), and v1_3 (orders list/show/update). Legacy's own in-code default was https://www.sendowl.com/api/v1 with every path relative to that; this bundle moves the /api/v1 segment into each path instead so a v1_2/v1_3 stream/write can coexist with the v1 ones under ONE base_url (see docs.md Known limits) -- the final resolved URL for every pre-existing (orders/products/subscriptions) stream/check is byte-identical to before.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
